name: instant-whiteboard
description: A minimal, slick whiteboard you can summon in any tab.

scripts.package: npm run build && mkdir -p releases && cd dist && zip -r "../releases/instant-whiteboard-v$npm_package_version.zip" . -x '*.DS_Store' -x '__MACOSX/*' && cd .. && echo "Created releases/instant-whiteboard-v$npm_package_version.zip"
